description_long: This handbag features a vibrant tie-dye pattern with symmetrical splashes of blue, yellow, pink, and white across its main body. The bag has a rectangular shape with a wide opening at the top, secured by a zipper closure. Two long, slender shoulder straps are attached at the top corners, each displaying a gradient of colors that complement the main body. The sides of the bag are narrow, emphasizing its slim profile, and the base appears flat for stable placement. The material looks like a soft, flexible fabric, likely canvas or polyester, with reinforced stitching at the strap attachments. There are no visible brand logos or decorative hardware, giving the bag a clean, modern look focused on its colorful pattern.
description: A rectangular handbag with a vivid tie-dye pattern, long colorful shoulder straps, and a zipper closure. The design is clean and modern, with no visible logos or decorative hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tie-dye pattern, both shoulder straps, and the zipper closure at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the bag and the colorful gradient on the straps.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical tie-dye pattern and strap attachments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow width and the continuation of the strap's color gradient.
attribute_strap_type: two long shoulder straps, non-adjustable, attached at top corners
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure at the top opening
attribute_pattern: symmetrical tie-dye pattern with blue, yellow, pink, and white colors
